blended.narrative: Revelstoke Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,355 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
